do: Arrive from Act 9 — talk to Lani on the dock (starts Safe Passage)
Talk to Weylam Roth and Divinia if they offer quests — flags the Ossuary pickups (respec book + Sanctum tome)
Stash/vendor, then head out to The Cathedral Rooftop
Fight across the rooftop to the Cathedral Apex
Kill Plaguewing and free Bannon
Take the exit down into The Ravaged Square
steps.layout: Linear — one path along the roof, arena at the end.
steps.tip: Don't full-clear the cultist waves — pop the boss and move.

do: Fight up to the waypoint at the upper-left and tag it — the north bridge is out, so the route winds
The Ossuary entrance sits right beside the waypoint
steps.layout: Hub zone — the plaza is dead centre, every act exit rings it. You'll pass through several more times.

do: Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy near the WP — last of the Merciless Lab trio (Acts 8/9/10)
Grab the Elixir of Allure and the Mortinomicon if marked — quick pickups, both pay out in town
Grab the crafting recipe if you spot it
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Lvl 67 — highest zone in the act. Trial + pickups only, don't clear.

do: Turn in Safe Passage (Lani — flask rewards)
Turn in the Elixir of Allure → Weylam Roth: Book of Regrets, 2 RESPEC POINTS
Give the Mortinomicon to Divinia (unlocks the Forbidden Sanctum later)
Waypoint → The Ravaged Square
Cross the plaza and take the south exit to The Control Blocks
Tag the waypoint just inside
Hunt down and kill Vilenta
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: Vilenta sits deep in the block — where the Miasmeter stood in Act 5.
steps.tip: Optional zone but never skip it — the kill is worth +1 passive.

do: Turn in Vilenta's Vengeance → Book of Skill, +1 PASSIVE (Lani)
OPTIONAL: all three Merciless trials are now done — run Merciless Lab (WP → Aspirant's Plaza) if your build wants ascendancy points 5–6 before Kitava
Waypoint → The Ravaged Square
Take the upper-right (north-east) exit to The Torched Courts
IF you care about Lilly's side quest: The Teardrop sits in The Reliquary (lower-right exit) — reward is only a rare belt, skip on league start
Push straight through to The Desecrated Chambers
steps.tip: Fire-heavy packs — mind your fire res here and for the rest of the act.

do: Tag the waypoint near the entrance
Kill Avarius, Reassembled in the Sanctum of Innocence — pick up THE STAFF OF PURITY
Grab the crafting recipe if you spot it
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: Mirrors Act 5's Chamber of Innocence — the boss sanctum sits at the centre of the loop.
steps.tip: Don't leave without the staff — it's the key through Kitava's Horns.

do: Give the Staff of Purity to Bannon — he sacrifices himself to wake Innocence
Talk to Lani for the Death and Rebirth reward (rare body armour)
Waypoint → The Ravaged Square
Talk to Innocence at the plaza — he shatters Kitava's Horns
Enter the now-open gate to The Canals
Push straight through to The Feeding Trough
Fight to the far end, grab the crafting recipe if you spot it
Talk to Sin to start the fight, then kill Kitava, the Insatiable at the Altar of Hunger
Take the portal back to Oriath Docks
steps.tip: Hardest campaign boss — cap fire res, keep moving through the slam/beam combos. Deaths in Part 2 cost 5% XP.

do: Talk to Lilly Roth and set sail for Karui Shores
Turn in An End to Hunger → +2 PASSIVES (Lani)
Type /passives — 24/24 quest points if you ran the kill-all-bandits route
Campaign complete. Kitava's curse: another -30% all res (-60% total) — fix resists before maps. Kirac and the map device are here.
